# Pinned seeds for the credit-limit invariant fuzz test.
# One u64 per line; `#` comments and blank lines are ignored.
# See README.md for how to add a newly-discovered failing seed.
#
# Each seed drives a full, independent 500-step create/cancel/set-limit
# sequence, so this small representative set already exercises limit shrink
# (no claw-back), rejection-on-create, and cancel-driven exposure decreases.
1
42
1337
